hero.heading: Speak directly with the engineers who write the firmware.
hero.body: Need controller consultation for a specific production line, custom manufacturing, bulk pricing, or urgent technical support — the QS team responds within 4 business hours.

form.heading: Request a quote & consultation
form.note: The QS team responds within 4 business hours (8:00–17:30, Mon–Fri). Need it urgently? Call (+84) 909.663.350.

success.heading: Thank you for contacting us!
success.body: The QS team will respond within 4 business hours (8:00–17:30, Mon–Fri).
